title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints for chat, embeddings, and tool-calling within LangChain chains.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI; chat history, model management, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull models, list models, and stream responses idiomatically.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; ingest PDFs and query with local LLM.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Community-enhanced Node CLI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal with markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a local AI copilot powered by any Ollama model; inline suggestions and chat pane.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building local NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed async client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and embed with Tokio.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama; includes session memory and model selector.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server containerized with one command.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams responses from Ollama models in Discord threads; supports slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama chat and generate actions into no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with GenServer-backed client and streaming support.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative Rust SDK focused on ergonomic builder patterns and native Tokio streaming for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting chat, generation, and embeddings with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Redis vector-search RAG example using Ollama embeddings and Redis as the vector database.
